title: nelitris forsteri
side_effects: Nelitris forsteri can have side effects if used improperly, such as liver damage, kidney failure, and cardiovascular issues, particularly when ingested in large quantities. Some individuals have reported experiencing nausea, dizziness, and vomiting after consuming the plant, while others have experienced allergic reactions, including hives and itching. In severe cases, prolonged consumption of nelitris forsteri can lead to seizures, coma, and even death. Furthermore, improper use of the plant has been linked to an increased risk of respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis.
